strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience (GISCollective) and community leadership via talks, workshops, and OSS
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform or product leadership at the scale a Principal/Director IC role requires
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC; no evidence of director-level influence, strategy work, or advising strategic customers
No advanced degree in AI and limited public record of recognized AI expertise

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI strategy and platform leadership track record
Seniority gap vs. director-level IC expectations
Breadth of engineering experience and recent AI-agent tooling work

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile engineer with strong craftsmanship, OSS contributions, and recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but the role targets a director-level IC who shapes AI strategy, advises strategic customers, and has a recognized track record of AI products or platforms. The resume shows Senior/Staff-level delivery work rather than the strategic influence, AI thought leadership, or large-org entrepreneurial scope the position requires.
